blocks.content: Notification policies live in the Alerting section of Grafana. In this milestone you navigate to the Notification policies page where the full policy tree is displayed.
To navigate to Notification policies, complete the following steps:
In Grafana Cloud, navigate to **Alerts & IRM > Alerting > Notification policies** from the main menu.

You should see the notification policy tree with the default policy at the top. The default policy shows its current contact point and grouping settings.

In the next milestone, you will open the default policy for editing and configure its settings.
